programs.title: Antiques Roadshow: Episode
programs.desc: Experts evaluate antiques and collectibles brought in by the public, revealing their history and value. Each item is assessed through storytelling, research, and on-the-spot appraisal. Hidden treasures, surprising discoveries, and emotional personal histories are uncovered throughout the show.

programs.title: Antiques Roadshow
programs.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts set up camp at Montacute House in Somerset.
